actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sid,
       cght.hthm,
       cght.sccj1,
       cght.cgry,
       cght.cgbm,
       cght.xdsq,
       cght.sfhz,
       cght.gdry,
       cght.gdbm,
       cght.kppm,
       cght.qydd,
       cght.jhdd,
       cght.chyq,
       cght.bzyq,
       cght.ysfs,
       cght.jsfs,
       cght.pzbz,
       cght.wyzren,
       cght.cpyq,
       cght.kpgc,
       cght.htje,
       cght.htzsl,
       cght.htzxs,
       cght.htzmz,
       cght.htzjz,
       cght.htztj
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.wxht=[合同申请.正式合同]) 
  AND permission('外销合同') 
ORDER BY cght.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.sid,
       cymx.chydh,
       cymx.fphm,
       cymx.chyrq,
       cymxsheet.cpbh,
       cymxsheet.zwpm,
       cymxsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cymxsheet.cght,
       cymxsheet.gcmc,
       cymxsheet.chsl,
       cymxsheet.kpgc
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymxsheet.wxht=[合同申请.正式合同]) 
  AND (ifnull(cymxsheet.chyrq,"")<>"") 
  AND (cymxsheet.fpsb1="是") 
  AND permission('出运明细') 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT krshsheet.sid,
       krshsheet.fphm,
       krshsheet.wxht,
       krshsheet.sydje,
       krsh.djdh
FROM krsh,krshsheet 
WHERE (krsh.rid=krshsheet.pid) 
  AND (krshsheet.wxht=[合同申请.正式合同]) 
ORDER BY krshsheet.sid ASC

actions.caption: 对应采购合同
actions.expression:
SELECT cght.rid 
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[合同申请.采购清单.合同号码]) 
ORDER BY cght.rid ASC

actions.name: 对应出运明细
actions.caption: 对应出运明细
actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.rid 
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[合同申请.出运清单.发票号码]) 
ORDER BY cymx.rid ASC

actions.name: 对应收汇
actions.caption: 对应收汇
actions.expression:
SELECT krsh.rid 
FROM krsh 
WHERE (krsh.djdh=[合同申请.收汇清单.收汇单号]) 
ORDER BY krsh.rid ASC

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT kh.company_name
FROM kh order by kh.company_name,kh.SID

SELECT khly.khly, khly.SID
FROM khly
ORDER BY khly.SID ASC
